purpose: Extend the DM transport surface with kind-7 reaction send/receive. Fix the leaf-module message-existence check bug in api.ts (move check to dispatcher sites). Produce outbound helpers publishDirectReaction and removeDirectReaction in directMessages.ts, wire inbound kind-7 dispatch in ContactChat.tsx, and expose a useDirectReactions(peerPubkeyHex) hook for the read side.

public_api.name: publishDirectReaction
public_api.signature: publishDirectReaction(params: { ndk: NDK; privateKeyHex: string; peerPubkeyHex: string; emoji: string; targetMessage: ChatMessage }): Promise<{ rumorId: string }>
public_api.description: Builds a kind-7 rumor via buildReactionRumor (with p tag), seals+wraps via sealAndWrap, publishes kind-1059 via NDK. Returns inner rumor id for optimistic row reconciliation. Lives in app/src/lib/directMessages.ts.

public_api.name: removeDirectReaction
public_api.signature: removeDirectReaction(params: { ndk: NDK; privateKeyHex: string; peerPubkeyHex: string; emoji: string; targetMessage: ChatMessage }): Promise<{ rumorId: string }>
public_api.description: Same as publishDirectReaction but calls buildReactionRumor with isRemoval: true. Lives in app/src/lib/directMessages.ts.

public_api.name: useDirectReactions
public_api.signature: useDirectReactions(peerPubkeyHex: string, selfPubkey: string, messages: ChatMessage[]): Map<string, ReactionAggregate[]>
public_api.description: React hook that subscribes to the DM reactions store via subscribeReactions and returns a Map<messageId, ReactionAggregate[]> recomputed on each listener fire. Lives in app/src/hooks/useDirectReactions.ts.

private_files: app/src/components/contacts/ContactChat.tsx (handleReact callback, kind-7 dispatch in handleGiftWrapEvent, __nostlingDmReactions bridge)
app/tests/unit/reactions/api.test.ts (modified: fix tests for pre-work change)
owned_data: quizzl:reactions:dm:{peerPubkeyHex} idb-keyval namespace (written via applyOptimistic/applyInboundRumor from api.ts)
dependencies_forbidden: app/src/context/ChatStoreContext.tsx (DM surface does not use group context)
events_emitted: subscribeReactions listeners fired after applyOptimistic, applyInboundRumor, rollbackOptimistic
events_consumed: kind-1059 inbound gift wrap via ContactChat handleGiftWrapEvent (kind-7 inner rumor)

pre_work.description: Remove the hasMessage check from applyInboundRumor in app/src/lib/reactions/api.ts. The leaf module always upserts; callers (dispatchers) are responsible for isMessageKnown gating. Add dispatcher gates: MarmotContext.tsx case 7 gates on loadMessages, ContactChat.tsx kind-7 dispatch gates on the in-memory messages array.
